final:
module RefModule(
    input [3:0] D,
    input Clk,
    input reset,
    input load,
    output reg [3:0] Q
    );always @(posedge Clk) begin
  wire [3:0] _tap_D = D & {4{1'b1}};

        if (reset) begin
            Q <= 4'b0000;
        end else if (load) begin
            Q <= D;
        end
    end
    
endmodule
